content: Patient selection criteria: relapsed/refractory disease after standard therapies (typically ≥2 prior lines for lymphoma, ≥2 prior lines for myeloma); adequate organ function (LVEF ≥50%, bilirubin ≤2x ULN, creatinine clearance ≥30-45 mL/min depending on product); performance status ECOG 0-2; no active CNS involvement (varies by product); no uncontrolled infections; no severe autoimmune disease. Contraindications: pregnancy, active hepatitis B/C without antiviral prophylaxis, HIV with low CD4 count. Pre-infusion evaluation: PET-CT for response assessment; bone marrow for ALL/myeloma; cardiac echo; pulmonary function tests; infectious disease screening. Post-infusion monitoring: daily assessment for CRS/ICANS using ASTCT grading criteria; CBC, CMP, coagulation studies, ferritin, fibrinogen, CRP; imaging at 1-3 months for response assessment. Long-term monitoring: B-cell aplasia and hypogammaglobulinemia for CD19-targeted products; secondary malignancies (boxed warning 2024); durable responses assessed by PET-CT at regular intervals.
